macro.title: More Americans are millionaires, but they don’t feel rich - The Washington Post
macro.summary: The number of American millionaires has reached a record high, but rising costs are chipping away at the value of nest eggs.

macro.title: Conagra Hires John Brase to Replace Sean Connolly as President, CEO - WSJ
macro.summary: Conagra says its board determined that Connolly will no longer serve as president and CEO as of May 31 and will also leave the board

macro.title: US Existing-Home Sales Fall to Nine-Month Low as Prices Rise - Bloomberg.com
macro.summary: Sales of previously owned US homes fell in March to the lowest since June, showcasing the challenges facing the housing market as it heads into the key spring selling season.

macro.title: Middle East oil production plunges due to Iran war, OPEC data shows - CNBC
macro.summary: The Gulf Arab states have cut production because they are unable to export through the Strait of Hormuz due to the war.
